evidence: "Just an absolute, exciting, great action-packed film."
"This film starts off unbelievable from the very start."
"My feeling was that the film dragged and was slow moving."
"This is a great, fast paced action film that keeps you engaged."
"Much better, known actors mixed with a good budget and special effects makes this one a great one to watch."
"Willis does it again, playing a burned-out cop who saves the day."
"I have no doubt that Redford made this to compare the emotions of Americans then to the emotions of Americans today."
"Great effects for the day as well."
"Good effects and good acting make this an enjoyable film."
"I hesitate to write what I really think of this movie as it seems to be so popular."

summary: The user enjoys action-packed films, particularly in the sci-fi and disaster genres, but has mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing. They appreciate visual effects but are less concerned with production quality and emotional depth.
